'''dajada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadmaster|roadmaster]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadmaster|roadmaster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dajada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæjædæth|dæjædæth]] || [[word:dæjædæj|dæjædæj]] || [[word:dæjædæsh|dæjædæsh]] || [[word:dæjædæ|dæjædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dajajadath|dajajadath]] || [[word:dajajadaj|dajajadaj]] || [[word:dajajadash|dajajadash]] || [[word:dajajada|dajajada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dajadath|dajadath]] || [[word:dajadaj|dajadaj]] || [[word:dajadash|dajadash]] || [[word:dajada|dajada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dajafdath|dajafdath]] || [[word:dajafdaj|dajafdaj]] || [[word:dajafdash|dajafdash]] || [[word:dajafdaf|dajafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dajadatha|dajadatha]] || [[word:dajadaja|dajadaja]] || [[word:dajadasha|dajadasha]] || [[word:dajadaka|dajadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dajadath|dajadath]] || [[word:dajadaj|dajadaj]] || [[word:dajadash|dajadash]] || [[word:dajada|dajada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dajadathal|dajadathal]] || [[word:dajadajal|dajadajal]] || [[word:dajadashal|dajadashal]] || [[word:dajadakal|dajadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dajadathatha|dajadathatha]] || [[word:dajadajaja|dajadajaja]] || [[word:dajadashasha|dajadashasha]] || [[word:dajadaka|dajadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dajadathan|dajadathan]] || [[word:dajadajan|dajadajan]] || [[word:dajadashan|dajadashan]] || [[word:dajadakan|dajadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dajadathaoro|dajadathaoro]] || [[word:dajadajaoro|dajadajaoro]] || [[word:dajadashaoro|dajadashaoro]] || [[word:dajadakaoro|dajadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
